runTitle: AI Engine local test refactor - current metrics evidence test split
coveredSurfaces: current metrics evidence provider tests: 4,145-line monolith reduced to a 131-line parsing basics file plus focused thematic test files
shared test helper: createEvidenceRequest extracted to current-metrics-evidence-test-helpers.ts
test file split: boundary guard, ranking, current metric, server health, contextual follow-up, filters, trend, directional, group, and status/filter regressions are now separate files
line-count check: 13 current-metrics test files checked and all are <=800 lines
targeted Vitest: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm test -- current-metrics passed (13 files / 109 tests)
AI Engine full Vitest: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm test passed (160 files / 1666 tests)
static gates: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run type-check, cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run line-guard, and git diff --check passed
skippedSurfaces: Production Cloud Run API was not rerun because this change only restructures local test files
Browser AI sidebar and Vercel UI QA were not repeated because no runtime UI or deployed behavior changed
Langfuse trace proof was not repeated because this refactor does not exercise live AI calls

expertAssessments.rationale: The oversized current-metrics evidence test file was split into focused files under the 800-line target, while preserving targeted and full AI Engine test coverage.

notes: Validation command: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm test -- current-metrics -> 13 files / 109 tests passed
Validation command: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run type-check -> passed
Validation command: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm test -> 160 files / 1666 tests passed
Validation command: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run line-guard -> passed with warnings only, no fail-threshold violations
Validation command: current-metrics test line-count check -> 13 files all <=800 lines
